title: Login page not loading
description: Users are unable to access the login page. The page shows a blank white screen after the URL is entered.

title: Invoice PDF export broken
description: Exporting invoices to PDF results in a corrupted file. Issue occurs for all invoice types.

title: Add dark mode support
description: Customer requests a dark mode toggle in the user settings panel for better accessibility.

title: Dashboard charts not rendering
description: The analytics dashboard shows empty chart containers. Issue is reproducible on Chrome and Firefox.

title: Email notifications delayed
description: Transactional emails are arriving 2–3 hours late. Affects password reset and order confirmation emails.

title: User profile picture upload fails
description: Uploading a profile picture returns a 500 error. Only affects files larger than 2MB.

title: Search results returning incorrect data
description: The global search feature returns unrelated results when special characters are used in the query.

title: Two-factor authentication not working
description: Users with 2FA enabled cannot complete login. The OTP verification step throws a timeout error.

title: Bulk delete not removing all records
description: When selecting all records and using bulk delete, only the first page of results is deleted.

title: API rate limit too restrictive
description: The current rate limit of 100 requests/min is too low for our integration. Requesting an increase to 500/min.

title: CSV import ignoring header row
description: When importing data via CSV, the first row (header) is being treated as a data entry and imported.

title: Mobile layout broken on iOS Safari
description: Several UI components overlap on iPhone devices using Safari. The issue does not appear on Android.

title: Timezone mismatch in scheduled reports
description: Scheduled reports are being sent based on UTC instead of the user's local timezone setting.

title: Permission roles not saving
description: Changes made to user permission roles revert to previous settings after page refresh.

title: Onboarding wizard skips step 3
description: New users going through the onboarding flow are automatically skipped past step 3 (team setup).
